app.name: Ultimate Bug Scanner
app.one_liner: A static analysis tool that catches 1000+ bug patterns across popular programming languages and auto-wires into AI coding agent quality guardrails.

screens.name: Main Scan Interface
screens.purpose: Provide entry point for initiating bug scans with support for automated agent integration and easy-mode setup.
primary_actions: Enable easy-mode for zero-interaction installation and scanning
Run full scan with default settings

rust_commands.name: list_items
rust_commands.purpose: Enumerate detected bug findings or available rule modules for inspection.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist scan results or configuration state securely without overwriting user files unexpectedly.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add confirmation guardrails to prevent silent file overwrites
week 1: Fix macOS shebang resolution to avoid bash 3.2 incompatibility
week 1: Implement core installer with immutable tag-based module fetching
acceptance_tests: CLI tools must not overwrite user-specified files without explicit confirmation or clear documentation.
Installer must fetch modules from immutable versioned tags, not mutable refs like 'main' or 'v${UBS_VERSION}'.
Scan output on macOS must not silently fail due to shebang resolution issues.
